_schema: OTR soak watcher overrides. Only keys below are honored; unknown keys are silently ignored. Values must match the closed sets in soak_operator.py (GENRES, TARGET_WORDS, TARGET_LENGTHS, STYLES, CREATIVITIES, OPT_PROFILES). Corrupt JSON is ignored. See soak_operator.py:apply_watcher_overrides for the full allowlist.

_allowed_keys.force_genre: one of: hard_sci_fi, space_opera, dystopian, time_travel, first_contact, cosmic_horror, cyberpunk, post_apocalyptic
_allowed_keys.force_style: one of: 'tense claustrophobic', 'space opera epic', 'psychological slow-burn', 'hard-sci-fi procedural', 'noir mystery', 'chaotic black-mirror'
_allowed_keys.pause_soak: true to pause the iteration loop (re-checks every 60s)
_allowed_keys.note_from_watcher: free-text string, echoed to soak_log.md, truncated to 500 chars

note_from_watcher: Cleared creativity pin 2026-04-13: 'maximum chaos' removed from soak pool entirely (see soak_operator.py CREATIVITIES comment). Override no longer needed.
